name: Harness Phase 0 — Context API + Bootstrap API
objective: Add the two foundational headless endpoints that every agent runtime needs before it can do anything: (1) GET /api/agent/context returns a lightweight summary of active workspace/project/task state so a runtime can orient itself without reading the full read-model; (2) GET /api/agent/bootstrap/:taskId returns a full execution pack for a specific task — metadata, acceptance criteria, top-3 related files, protocol instructions — capped at a safe context budget. No new persistence, no new schema: both endpoints project from the existing VaultReadModel.
exit_criteria: GET /api/agent/context returns { workspaceId, workspaceName, projects[], openTaskCount, pendingApprovalCount, boardSummary[] } — no auth, JSON.
GET /api/agent/bootstrap/:taskId returns { task, objective, acceptanceCriteria, constraints, relatedFiles[max3], protocolInstructions, approvalPolicy } — missing task → 404.
Both endpoints are covered by unit tests.
CLI has `context` and `bootstrap <taskId>` commands that call the new endpoints.
bun test passes with no new failures.
